source_intake_record.raw_question_text: The voltage \( e_o \) shown in the <image> has been measured by an ideal voltmeter. Which of the following can be calculated?

choice_map.A: Bias current of the inverting input only
choice_map.B: Bias current of the inverting and non-inverting inputs only
choice_map.D: Both the bias currents and the input offset current
